title: Math Whiz topic manifest
description: Pure-data description of one curriculum topic. Lives next to the topic's code as manifest.json and is the single source of truth for topic metadata (see docs/PLUGGABLE_CONTENT_PLAN.md). Validated by scripts/build-content-registry.js.

id.description: Kebab-case slug. Must equal the topic's folder name. Unique within its grade.

name.description: Display name AND Firestore storage key (daily goals, progress paths, question-bank docs, focus restrictions are all keyed by it). IMMUTABLE once published — renaming orphans student data. To change the label, set displayName and add the old spelling to aliases.

displayName.description: Optional UI label override. Defaults to name.

grade.description: Grade key. Must equal the enclosing grade folder's grade.json key.

order.description: Display order within the grade (student topic picker, prompts, dropdowns). Unique per grade.

standards.description: Common Core standard codes covered by this topic.

subtopics.description: Single source of truth for the topic's subtopics (portal Focus modals, generators, AI prompts, validation).

subtopicAliases.description: Alternate subtopic labels mapped to their canonical subtopic (each value MUST be an entry of subtopics — enforced by the codegen). Used when normalizing AI- or teacher-supplied subtopic names, e.g. teacher-ai-focus-analysis.

icon.description: Single glyph or emoji shown on the topic card.

theme.description: Named color theme. Mapped to literal Tailwind class bundles in code (Phase 2: src/components/topicThemes.js) because Tailwind's JIT purges class strings it cannot see statically — never put raw class names in JSON.

guidelines.description: One-line topic guideline embedded in AI question-generation prompts (gemini-generate-questions TOPIC_GUIDELINES). Wording changes alter live prompts — see the Phase 0 snapshots.

legacyExplanationHtml.description: Legacy iframe explanation under public/ used only when the React Explanation component is unavailable. null when the topic never had one.

aliases.description: Former names of this topic, used for normalized matching of old question-bank documents.

enabled.description: false = topic is fully wired but hidden from students (safe staging). Validation surfaces stay permissive for disabled topics.
